title: Standings and team/aggregate stats double-count matches for overlapping 2012-2019 seasons
evidence: src/query-engine.ts:379-384 getStandings() sums BOTH store.brasileirao and store.historical for the same season; Brasileirao_Matches.csv (2012-2022) and novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv (2003-2019) overlap on seasons 2012-2019 (verified via csv DictReader). queryMatches() (src/query-engine.ts:168-211) also emits each physical match twice because the dedup key at :231 includes the competition label ('Brasileirão Serie A' vs 'Brasileirão (Historical)'), so getTeamStats/getLeagueStats/getTopScoringTeams/getBiggestWins all double-count 2012-2019. Tests pass anyway because assertions are inequalities (e.g. index.test.ts:181 wins>10).
suggestion: Dedup overlapping sources by (normalized teams, date, score) before aggregating, or pick one Brasileirão source per season range so standings/stats are computed once.

title: Bidirectional substring team matching conflates distinct clubs
evidence: src/query-engine.ts:12-16 teamMatches() returns true when EITHER name contains the other (t.includes(n) || n.includes(t)). A query for 'Atletico' matches Atletico-MG, Atletico-PR and Atletico-GO together; team names are normalized in the loader but query input is not, so distinct clubs sharing a prefix are merged in get_team_stats / search_matches results.
suggestion: Normalize the query string too and prefer exact-or-word-boundary matching for team filters; fall back to substring only when no exact match exists.

title: Date-range filter silently drops rows with unparseable dates
evidence: src/query-engine.ts:148-161 matchesDate() returns false for any row whose date fails parseDate() when a date filter is active; parseDate (src/query-engine.ts:18-32) only handles YYYY-MM-DD and DD/MM/YYYY, so extended-dataset rows (BR-Football-Dataset.csv 'date' column) with other formats are excluded from date-filtered queries without warning.
suggestion: Log or count dropped rows, and broaden parseDate to cover the extended dataset's date format.

title: Extra tooling beyond the spec
evidence: src/index.ts:139-143,280-302 add get_top_scoring_teams and get_dataset_info tools not required by the spec; 9 MCP tools total cover all required query categories.
suggestion: None — noted as scope beyond the requirement checklist.
